page_metadata.bioconda__summary: A method for variant graph genotyping based on exact alignment of k-mers.
page_metadata.biocontainers__summary: A method for variant graph genotyping based on exact alignment of k-mers
page_metadata.biotools__summary: Perform genotyping of all types of variation (including SNPs, indels and complex structural variants) based on an input set of variants and read k-mer counts.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: Perform genotyping of all types of variation (including SNPs, indels and complex structural variants) based on an input set of variants and read k-mer counts.
